project:
  type: website
  output-dir: _site

website:
  title: "Gendreau Lab"
  site-url: "https://example.org"
  description: "Research, publications, and web-based predictive calculators from the Gendreau Lab."
  navbar:
    left:
      - text: "Home"
        href: index.qmd
      - text: "Calculators"
        href: calculators.qmd
      - text: "Publications"
        href: publications.qmd
      - text: "Projects"
        href: projects.qmd
      - text: "Team"
        href: team.qmd
      - text: "Resources"
        href: resources.qmd
      - text: "Contact"
        href: contact.qmd
    right:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/your-lab
        aria-label: GitHub
  page-footer:
    left: "© Gendreau Lab"
    right: "Built with Quarto"
  search: true

format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
